MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Jennifer Becker, Esq. for Plaintiff: Neil A. Solomon dba NAS Consulting Services.
Plaintiff's Witness: Neil Solomon, was sworn and examined.
Good cause appearing and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: EBM Solutions, Inc., as follows:
Principal $30,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $10,243.98
Costs $955.50.
Attorneys' Fees and Total to be calculated by counsel.
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.

Sept. 22, 2005
Attorney's Fees $4,389.50 and a total of $45,58898.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Set For Trial On Nov-28-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-10-05 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 505
